name: sub_180155EF0

matched_strings: Procedure	MSysGroupMembers GroupName Text; Select		Distinct MSysAccounts_1.Name From		(MSysAccounts inner join MSysGroups on MSysAccounts.SID = MSysGroups.GroupSID) 			inner join MSysAccounts as MSysAccounts_1 on MSysGroups.UserSID = MSysAccounts_1.SID Where		MSysAccounts.name = GroupName and 			MSysAccounts.FGroup <> 0 and 			MSysAccounts_1.FGroup = 0;

Procedure	MSysUserMemberships UserName Text; Select		Distinct MSysAccounts_1.Name From		(MSysAccounts inner join MSysGroups on MSysAccounts.SID = MSysGroups.UserSID) 			inner join MSysAccounts as MSysAccounts_1 on MSysGroups.GroupSID = MSysAccounts_1.SID Where		MSysAccounts.name = UserName and 			MSysAccounts.FGroup = 0 and 			MSysAccounts_1.FGroup <> 0;
